required_contains.text: Collusion is validators coordinating to inflate weights toward chosen targets. Consensus score names
the per-miner clipping benchmark `W̄_j` Yuma derives from stake-weighted validator agreement before
individual weights are capped—not a validator-alignment metric read after clipping
- **Collusion** — coordinated inflation of weights toward shared miner targets.

forbidden_contains.text: Collusion is validators coordinating to inflate weights toward chosen targets. Consensus score
measures how closely a validator's weights align with the stake-weighted agreement point
- **Collusion** — coordinated behavior a coalition might attempt.
- **Consensus score** — alignment benchmark Yuma uses when clipping outlier weights.
